Resolution demo: from packages/pi-context-cli, require.resolve('@davidorex/pi-project-workflows/package.json') -> packages/pi-project-workflows/package.json. npm install clean (no ERESOLVE/peer); npm run build green (CLI bin still -rwxr-xr-x, TASK-028 intact); check clean; full test suite exit 0 (fail 0). Fresh adversarial probe: PASS, no defects. Merged dafa2c6 fast-forward to context-jit-spec-v2. Honest caveat: in-repo the resolve succeeds via the workspace symlink regardless of the declaration — the declaration's effect is only provable at a registry install (deferred, release-gated).
